arts.ttl: Aston Villa and Tottenham have golden chance to sign £25m ace, he's played only three games this season
arts.sum: He is suddenly out of favour...

arts.ttl: Emery's 'very, very important' Villa warning as excuses rejected ahead of Palace
arts.sum: "Try to analyse deeply how we can get better even playing like we want, not taking points and losing opportunities to win. Of course we wanted to fight and face those teams maybe playing more or less like I planned, but we made some mistakes and against teams like that it is difficult to get points.

arts.ttl: Eberechi Eze injury update and Crystal Palace team news for Aston Villa clash
arts.sum: Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner has confirmed Eberechi Eze has been ruled out of their trip to Aston Villa this weekend. Eberechi Eze injury update and Crystal Palace team news for Aston Villa clash

arts.ttl: Unai Emery sets out three clear Aston Villa demands to arrest slump in form
arts.sum: Unai Emery is calling for calm over Aston Villa's slump in form, while also admitting his players need to take more care with the "small details" and manage their frustration. Emery is not concerned about his side's results before the November international break, although he understands the importance of tomorrow's fixture.

arts.ttl: The key quotes from Glasner's pre-Aston Villa press conference
arts.sum: Crystal Palace travel to Aston Villa on Saturday afternoon hoping to repeat their victory there in the Carabao Cup last month – with manager Oliver Glasner discussing the challenges posed by the upcoming winter fixture schedule in his pre-match press conference...

arts.ttl: Team News: Aston Villa vs. Crystal Palace injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Aston Villa and Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa injury updates as four ruled out of Crystal Palace clash
arts.sum: Unai Emery has confirmed Ezri Konsa, Amadou Onana, Boubacar Kamara and Jacob Ramsey have been ruled out of Aston Villa's Premier League clash against Crystal Palace. Asked which players will be sidelined for Saturday's match, Emery said: "Konsa, Amadou Onana, Kamara and Ramsey.

arts.ttl: How to watch & follow Villa v Palace LIVE
arts.sum: Crystal Palace travel to the West Midlands to take on Aston Villa in the Premier League on Saturday, 23rd November (KO: 15:00 GMT) – here's how you can watch and follow the action LIVE!

arts.ttl: Aston Villa told key dates as Premier League drop 2025/26 season reveal
arts.sum: In a statement, the Premier League said: “The Premier League 2025/26 season dates have been confirmed, with the opening match round starting on Saturday 16 August 2025. The Premier League added: “The start date of 16 August allows for the maximum player rest time available – 83 clear days – from the end of the 2024/25 season.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace still to be without key attackers - Oliver Glasner delivers injury news ahead of Aston Villa
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner has confirmed that Eberechi Eze and Eddie Nketiah will still be out for Crystal Palace’s trip to Aston Villa on Saturday. The Palace boss also confirmed that Eddie Nketiah, hamstring, will be missing for the Eagles at Villa Park.
